artPrompt: A meticulous goblin advisor in spectacles and pinstripes hunched over a back-room desk, sliding beads on an abacus while stacks of favor tokens and brown envelopes pile beside an open ledger, a thin satisfied smile as he finds one more hidden debt. A single amber lamp gilds his lenses and the coins, cigar smoke hazing the ink-black room behind. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Syndicate Accountant
text:
Whenever you would create one or more Favor tokens, create that many plus one instead. He finds a debt nobody remembered incurring, every single time.
{4}, {T}: Audit the table. Each opponent reveals their hand; for each card revealed, you may sacrifice a Favor token to make them discard it. Receipts, please.
flavorText: He does not commit crimes. He merely makes them add up.
